privileged_info_summary: The pixelate_mosaic task uses real images from Unsplash (two URLs for primary and fallback): photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d (800x1200 JPEG) and photo-1544005313-94ddf0286df2 (800x1199 JPEG). If both URLs fail, a synthetic test image is generated using ImageMagick. The task runs with a 90-second timeout and maximum 8 steps. The verifier checks pixelation effectiveness using 4 criteria: uniform block detection (≥40%), significant detail reduction (edge reduction ≥50% or variance reduction ≥30%), low variance regions (≥25%), and image modification. A score of 75% (3/4 criteria) is required to pass. The result is exported as pixelated_image.jpg.
